scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:docs
scripts.release: npm run build:ui && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version -w packages/ui && npm publish -w packages/ui
scripts.release:minor: npm run build:ui && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version -w packages/ui && npm publish -w packages/ui
scripts.release:major: npm run build:ui && npm version major --no-git-tag-version -w packages/ui && npm publish -w packages/ui
